name: HALLADOR ENERGY CO
summary: Hallador Energy Company is a vertically integrated independent power producer and fuel company operating primarily in Indiana. Through Hallador Power, it owns and operates the 1,080 MW Merom coal-fired power plant, selling accredited capacity and wholesale energy within the MISO market. Through Sunrise Coal, it mines bituminous coal in the Illinois Basin, supplying power plants in the Midwest and Southeast United States.

products.name: Accredited Capacity
products.description: Dispatchable electric capacity sold to utilities and energy market participants via PPAs and bilateral transactions within the MISO system.

products.name: Wholesale Energy
products.description: Wholesale electricity sold to utilities, cooperatives, and market participants via PPAs, bilateral transactions, and MISO spot markets.

products.name: Bituminous Coal
products.description: Coal mined from Illinois Basin reserves and sold to power plants in the Midwest and Southeast United States.

partnerships.description: Hallador holds a 50% interest, accounted for using the equity method.
Hallador holds a 50% interest, accounted for using the equity method.
